ddls:
CREATE TABLE "breeds" (
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breed */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the breed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the breed */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the breed */,
  "min_height" REAL /* Minimum height of the breed in inches */,
  "max_height" REAL /* Maximum height of the breed in inches */,
  "min_weight" REAL /* Minimum weight of the breed in pounds */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight of the breed in pounds */,
  "min_expectancy" INTEGER /* Minimum life expectancy of the breed in years */,
  "max_expectancy" INTEGER /* Maximum life expectancy of the breed in years */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the breed */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the breed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the breed was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the breed was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperaments" (
  "temperament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperament */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the breed */,
  "temperament" TEXT /* Temperament of the breed (e.g., Confident, Famously Funny, Fearless) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the temperament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperaments_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., Toy Group, Hound Group) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breed_groups" (
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the breed */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the breed was added to the group */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the breed was last updated in the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_id", "group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grooming" (
  "grooming_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grooming record */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the breed */,
  "grooming_frequency" TEXT /* Grooming frequency (e.g., Daily, 2-3 Times a Week) */,
  "shedding" TEXT /* Shedding (e.g., Seasonal, Occasional) */,
  "coat_length" TEXT /* Coat length (e.g., Short, Medium, Long) */,
  "coat_type" TEXT /* Coat type (e.g., Smooth, Curly, Wirey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grooming_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grooming_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_levels" (
  "energy_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy level record */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the breed */,
  "energy_level" TEXT /* Energy level (e.g., Energetic, Regular Exercise) */,
  "exercise_needs" TEXT /* Exercise needs (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "playfulness" TEXT /* Playfulness (e.g., Very Playful, Somewhat Playful, Not Very Playful) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_levels_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demeanors" (
  "demeanor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demeanor record */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the breed */,
  "demeanor" TEXT /* Demeanor (e.g., Outgoing, Aloof/Wary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demeanor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demeanor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demeanors_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Breeder, General User) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the review */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the breed being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment made by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the breed the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id")
)
